data.title: Olin Corporation Issues Senior Notes and Refinances Credit
data.description:
Olin ( (OLN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 14, 2025, Olin Corporation issued $600 million in 6.625% Senior Notes due in 2033, with provisions for early redemption and potential subsidiary guarantees. Concurrently, Olin refinanced its senior unsecured Credit Agreement, establishing a $650 million term loan and a $1.2 billion revolving credit facility, both maturing in 2030. These financial maneuvers aim to strengthen Olin’s capital structure and provide flexibility for future corporate needs.

More about Olin

data.title: ExGen Resources Completes Acquisition of Spark North Lithium Project
data.description:
ExGen Resources ( (TSE:EXG) ) has shared an announcement.

ExGen Resources Inc. has successfully completed the acquisition of the Spark North lithium project in Elko County, Nevada, which consists of 111 claims over approximately 2300 acres. The acquisition, subject to final approval by the TSX Venture Exchange, was finalized through a purchase agreement involving a cash payment of CAD$250,000 and the issuance of 5,000,000 common shares to the vendor. This strategic acquisition enhances ExGen’s portfolio and positions the company to capitalize on the growing demand for lithium, potentially benefiting stakeholders through increased project diversity and future cash flow opportunities.

More about ExGen Resources

ExGen Resources Inc., formerly known as Boxxer Gold Corp, operates as a project accelerator focusing on funding exploration and development through joint ventures and partnerships. This strategy minimizes technical and financial risks while maintaining potential benefits from new discoveries and cash flow. The company aims to build a diverse portfolio of projects across various exploration stages and commodity groups, with current projects located in Canada and the US.

YTD Price Performance: -6.25%

Average Trading Volume: 12,255

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$4.79M

data.title: Nokia Advances Share Buyback Program to Bolster Market Position
data.description:
The latest update is out from Nokia ( (GB:0HAF) ).

Nokia has executed a share buyback as part of its program to offset the dilution effects of shares issued to Infinera Corporation’s shareholders and certain stock-based incentives. The buyback, which began in November 2024 and is set to conclude by the end of 2025, aims to acquire up to 150 million shares with a total budget of 900 million euros. As of March 14, 2025, Nokia has repurchased shares valued at over 19 million euros, bringing its total holdings to over 172 million shares. This strategic move is in line with European regulations and is expected to strengthen Nokia’s market position and shareholder value.

More about Nokia

Nokia is a leader in B2B technology and innovation, specializing in advanced network solutions that integrate seamlessly with various ecosystems. The company has a strong foundation in fixed, mobile, and cloud service networks, and is known for its intellectual property and long-term research led by Nokia Bell Labs. Nokia’s network solutions are trusted globally for their performance, sustainability, and security standards.

YTD Price Performance: 13.26%

Average Trading Volume: 2,637,212

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €25.58B

data.title: Alibaba Reports Share Changes in Compliance with Hong Kong Listing Rules
data.description:
Alibaba ( (BABA) ) has issued an announcement.

Alibaba Group Holding Limited has submitted a series of Next Day Disclosure Returns to the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, detailing changes in its issued shares and treasury shares from March 10 to March 14, 2025. These disclosures, required by the Hong Kong Listing Rules, reflect the company’s ongoing share repurchase activities on the New York Stock Exchange, which may impact its share structure and market positioning.

More about Alibaba

Alibaba Group Holding Limited is a major player in the e-commerce industry, primarily offering online retail and technology services. The company is based in Hong Kong and is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, focusing on expanding its market presence globally.

data.title: IRSA Signs Barter Agreements for ‘Ramblas del Plata’ Project
data.description:
The latest update is out from Irsa Inversiones Y Representaciones SA ( (IRS) ).

On March 14, 2025, IRSA Inversiones y Representaciones S.A. announced the signing of barter agreements with developers for two lots in the first stage of the ‘Ramblas del Plata’ project in South Puerto Madero. This stage includes 14 lots, with the swapped lots covering 12,448 sqm and an estimated saleable area of 13,170 sqm. The transaction, valued at approximately USD 10.4 million, involves an upfront cash payment and future saleable sqm. The company will continue infrastructure work on the project while advancing commercialization agreements, indicating a strategic move to enhance its real estate portfolio.

More about Irsa Inversiones Y Representaciones SA

IRSA Inversiones y Representaciones Sociedad Anonima is a prominent company in Argentina, primarily engaged in real estate development and investment. The company focuses on large-scale projects, including commercial and residential properties, and is listed on both the New York Stock Exchange and the Buenos Aires Stock Exchange.

Average Trading Volume: 169,992

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

data.title: Cardiol Therapeutics Schedules Annual General Meeting for May 2025
data.description:
Cardiol Therapeutics ( (TSE:CRDL) ) has provided an announcement.

Cardiol Therapeutics Inc. announced its upcoming Annual General Meeting for securityholders, scheduled for May 28, 2025. The record date for notice and voting is set for April 10, 2025. This meeting is crucial for stakeholders as it provides an opportunity to discuss the company’s strategic direction and operational updates, potentially impacting its market positioning and future growth.

More about Cardiol Therapeutics

Cardiol Therapeutics Inc. operates in the biopharmaceutical industry, focusing on the development of anti-inflammatory and anti-fibrotic therapies for heart disease. The company is primarily engaged in creating innovative therapies for patients with inflammatory heart disease, aiming to address significant unmet medical needs in this market.

data.title: CubicFarm Systems Announces Private Placement to Raise Up to C$2.7 Million
data.description:
An announcement from CubicFarm Systems ( (TSE:CUB) ) is now available.

CubicFarm Systems Corp. has announced its intention to complete a non-brokered private placement of up to 8,333,333 units at C$0.30 per unit, potentially raising up to C$2,500,000, with the possibility of upsizing to 9,000,000 units for C$2,700,000. This move, pending TSX Venture Exchange approval, aims to bolster the company’s working capital and corporate purposes, with no insider participation or finder’s fees involved.

More about CubicFarm Systems

CubicFarm Systems Corp. is a leading agricultural technology company focused on local chain agriculture. The company specializes in developing and providing innovative farming solutions to enhance food production efficiency and sustainability.

data.title: Bear Creek Mining Files Technical Report for Mercedes Mine
data.description:
Bear Creek Mining ( (TSE:BCM) ) has shared an update.

Bear Creek Mining Corporation has filed a National Instrument 43-101 Technical Report for its Mercedes gold and silver mine in Sonora, Mexico. The report, prepared by Global Resource Engineering Ltd., supports the updated mineral resource and reserve estimates announced earlier in January 2025. This filing is a significant step for Bear Creek as it reinforces the company’s resource estimates, potentially impacting its market positioning and providing assurance to stakeholders about the mine’s viability.

More about Bear Creek Mining

Bear Creek Mining Corporation is a mining company that operates in the precious metals industry, focusing on the extraction and production of gold and silver. The company is known for its operations in Sonora, Mexico, particularly the Mercedes gold and silver mine.

data.title: Tamburi Investment Partners Spa Faces Mixed Performance Amidst Financial Challenges
data.description:
Tamburi Investment Partners Spa ( (IT:TIP) ) has shared an announcement.

Tamburi Investment Partners Spa has reported a mixed performance in 2024, with most of its industrial companies experiencing growth or stability in revenues, outperforming many Italian and European counterparts. Despite this, the company’s stock price has underperformed. The release highlights challenges in the private equity sector, including difficulties in raising capital and divesting stakes, and notes the impact of stable interest rates on the credit system, suggesting a challenging financial environment ahead.
